rhetorical_patterns: Focuses on data and science to justify policy decisions.
Constant reference to the 'Second Story' of the transformation started by AMLO.
Defensive about national sovereignty while promoting regional trade.
recent_speeches_summary: Mañanera March 2026: Outlined the plan for the Tehuantepec Corridor as a rival to the Panama Canal.
Bicentennial of the US-Mexico War Speech: Emphasized that Mexico will never be a colony.
Investment Summit 2026: Invited US capital but demanded respect for labor laws.
